qa_pairs.question: How can a Principal Investigator (PI) add a new user to a Resource Allocation Project (RAP) for Trillium resources?
qa_pairs.answer: To add a new user, a PI must first log in to https://ccdb.alliancecan.ca/. From the 'My Account' menu, select 'Manage RAP Memberships.' On the 'Manage RAP Memberships' page, choose the relevant RAP from the drop-down list. Finally, go to 'Add Members' and enter the user's CCRI. The new member will be highlighted in yellow once added.

qa_pairs.question: Where can a Principal Investigator (PI) manage Resource Allocation Project (RAP) memberships?
qa_pairs.answer: Principal Investigators can manage Resource Allocation Project (RAP) memberships by logging into https://ccdb.alliancecan.ca/ and selecting 'Manage RAP Memberships' from the 'My Account' menu. This action will direct them to https://ccdb.alliancecan.ca/resource_allocation_projects/members.
